subject: [PATCH v2 08/14] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT plumbing

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the userfaultfd interface, allowing userspace to track read-write protection (RWP) on registered memory ranges. It introduces two new ioctls: UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT, which enable RWP tracking and installation/removal of RWP on a range. The patch also includes plumbing for the feature, including capability bits and VMA flags. The goal is to prevent RWP state from outliving the uffd and ensure that re-registering a range does not drop modes that install per-PTE markers.
